title: Can’t stall Dhurandhar 2 just because a small section of society objects: Madras High Court
description: The Madras High Court on April 10 refused to restrain the screening of movie Dhurandhar: The Revenge during the ongoing election period in Tamil Nadu [D Rakesh Vs Chief Election Commissioner]A Bench of Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G Arul Murugan said that a film certified by censor board cannot be stalled merely because a section of society objects to its contentThus, the Court dismissed a public interest litigation petition seeking to prohibit the film’s exhibition in
